data.limitsPerYear: 2 land border crossings per calendar year on visa exemption

crossingOptions.name: Padang Besar (Hat Yai → Padang Besar)
crossingOptions.notes: Most popular crossing. Train available from Hat Yai. Smooth for US passport holders.

data.enforcementPosture: Moderate — officers have discretion. Repeat crossings within same year may trigger questioning.
warnings: Exceeding 2 land crossings per year may result in denial of entry
Always carry proof of funds and onward ticket for border runs

gaps: Exact enforcement posture at specific crossings is community-sourced only
